title: BondCommitment (v1)
description: An agent's self-signed commitment bond — proof-of-funds at its OWN sovereign Solana address (bonded_address == base58btc(bonded_public_key)). An anti-sybil staked signal, RPC-verified never custodied; phase 1 is a signal, NOT collateral/escrow/recourse. See spec/bond-v1.md.

bond_id.description: UUID v7, generated by the bonding agent.

bonded_public_key.description: Hex-encoded 32-byte Ed25519 identity public key — the signer, whose base58btc encoding IS `bonded_address`.

bonded_address.description: Base58 sovereign address holding the backing capital. MUST equal base58btc(bonded_public_key) — the anti-sybil binding a verifier re-checks fail-closed.

bond_amount_micro.description: Committed amount in integer USDC micro-units (1 USD = 1,000,000).

asset.description: The settlement asset backing the bond. `USDC` at land.

chain.description: CAIP-2 chain identifier the bonded_address lives on (e.g. solana:5eykt4UsFv8P8NJdTREpY1vzqKqZKvdp).

issued_at.description: Epoch milliseconds when the bond was issued.

expires_at.description: Epoch milliseconds when the bond commitment expires and must be re-issued.

suite.description: Cryptosuite — always `motebit-jcs-ed25519-b64-v1` (JCS, Ed25519, base64url signature). Verifiers reject missing or unknown values fail-closed.

signature.description: Base64url Ed25519 signature over canonicalJson of every field except `signature`, by `bonded_public_key`.
